mapper.delete:
delete from dish where shop_id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select d.*,c.name categoryName from dish d left join category c on d.category_id = c.id
and d.name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%')
and c.name like concat('%',#{categoryName},'%')
and d.shop_id = #{shopId}
order by update_time desc
